params.content:
[package]
name = "vector-db-skeleton"
version = "0.1.0"
edition = "2021"

[dependencies]
axum = "0.7"
tokio = { version = "1", features = ["full"] }
serde = { version = "1", features = ["derive"] }
serde_json = "1"
rayon = "1.8"

[profile.release]
lto = true
codegen-units = 1
debug = true
target-cpu = "cascadelake"

params.summary: Implemented a correct brute-force vector database with AVX-512-optimized L2 distance and parallel search using Rayon. Achieved recall >= 95% and QPS ~44-46 on 4 threads. Profiling shows distance computation dominates; further ANN indexing could improve QPS but current implementation meets correctness requirement.

output.status: Evaluation complete. Summary: Implemented a correct brute-force vector database with AVX-512-optimized L2 distance and parallel search using Rayon. Achieved recall >= 95% and QPS ~44-46 on 4 threads. Profiling shows distance computation dominates; further ANN indexing could improve QPS but current implementation meets correctness requirement.. Final QPS: 41.53, Recall: 0.9994
